gaming.subtitle: Pick a team every round and survive

emptyBody: Once you join a Survivor, it will show up here so you can follow it.
loadError: Couldn't load your Survivor. Please try again later.

detail.noRoundsBody: There are no rounds available for this Survivor yet.
detail.noFixturesBody: There are no fixtures scheduled for this round.
detail.tapToPick: Tap a crest to pick your team
detail.pickRoundSubtitle: Pick your team for this round

rules.title: Survivor rules
rules.subtitle: How the game works
rules.goalText: Survive as many rounds as possible by picking, each round, a team you think will win.
rules.step1: Each round, pick one team from the available matches.
rules.step2: You can't reuse a team you've already picked earlier in this Survivor — once used, it's "burned" for the rest of the competition.
rules.step3: You may change your pick as many times as you like while the round hasn't started yet.
rules.step4: Once the first match of the round kicks off, the round locks completely: no more picks or changes are allowed.

lives.lossHint: The team you picked loses its match
lives.noPickHint: You made no pick before the round locked
lives.drawHint: A draw doesn't cost a life — you survive

rules.livesNote: Each participant starts with a number of lives set by the pool (typically 1). Reaching 0 lives means you're eliminated from the Survivor.
rules.endText: The Survivor ends when the tournament's rounds run out, or when a single survivor remains, depending on how the pool is configured.

mypicks.title: My Picks
mypicks.subtitle: Your chosen team each round
mypicks.deleteSuccessBody: You can now choose another team for this round.
mypicks.bulkConfirmBody: This can't be undone. You'll be able to choose a team again for those rounds.
mypicks.bulkDeleteSuccessBodyOne: You can now choose another team for that round.
mypicks.bulkDeleteSuccessBodyOther: You can now choose another team for those rounds.
mypicks.emptyBody: Once you pick a team in a round, your history will show up here.
